'''Nygreena Clo''' was a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Discovered near birth to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] and raised at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]], Clo trained at the [[Jedi academy|academy]] there and learned the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Eventually [[Initiate Trials/Legends|graduating]] and studying as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], Clo passed the [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Jedi Trials]] and was [[Knighting Ceremony/Legends|recognized]] as a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]].<ref name="HNN" />

Just prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Clo was dispatched to [[Kabal/Legends|Kabal]] with fellow Knights [[Ixian Rovieda]], [[Plessus Ghon]], and the Padawan [[Renxis Dielle]] to end the month-long riots in the capital city of [[Shoribus]]. The riots begun due to planet-wide food shortages, and were only ended when the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] dropped parcels of rations and other food stuff within the city. The riots claimed many lives, including that of [[Premiere (Kabal)|Premiere]] [[Jan Dovu]]; holo-footage of several robed bodies were transmitted over the [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] and the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] confirmed that Clo and the other Jedi were indeed dead.<ref name="HNN" />
